## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Feature is fully implemented
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Mobile responsive

## Notes
> ⚠️ Do **not** begin coding until assigned by the maintainer.
> Branch as `fix/N-short-title` or `feat/N-short-title`.
